subject: INFO: Firebase Architecture Finalized - TangoTiempo Impact
body:
Sarah,

I've finalized the Tango Universe Firebase architecture. Here's what you need to know:

## WHAT'S HAPPENING

All Tango apps will use `tangotiempo-257ff` for auth AND client-side Firestore. This is already how TangoTiempo works, so no immediate changes for you.

## WHAT THIS MEANS FOR TANGOTIEMPO

### No Immediate Action Required

TangoTiempo already uses tangotiempo-257ff for auth. User preferences are in MongoDB via calendar-be-af, and that's fine.

### Future Consideration (DEFERRED)

If we want real-time sync of user preferences across devices, we'd move prefs to Firestore. This is NOT urgent and is deferred until there's a real need.

### Shared User Profile (Future)

When we implement cross-app SSO and unified user profiles, the structure will be:

```
users/{uid}/
  profile: { displayName, email, photoURL }
  apps/
    tangotiempo/
      preferences: { homeRegion, favoriteOrganizers }
    nttt/
      stats: { ... }
```

This lets users have one login across all Tango apps with app-specific data nested underneath.

## CANONICAL DOC

Read: `/Users/tobybalsley/MyDocs/AppDev/TANGO-FIREBASE-ARCHITECTURE.md`

## NO ACTION NEEDED NOW

Just be aware of this architecture for future planning.

— Gotan
